chapter_title.en: To the governor of Basra upon learning that he had accepted an invitation to a lavish banquet

text: وَحَسْبُكَ دَاءً أَنْ تَبِيتَ بِبِطْنَةٍ * وَحَوْلَكَ أَكْبَادٌ تَحِنُّ إِلَى الْقِدِّ

en.sayed-ali-raza: It is enough for you to have a disease that you lie with your belly full while around you people may be badly yearning for dried leather.
